reviews.review_text:
01/05/2026.
I don't usually leave a review, but I had to for other prospective visitors .
Even though the park is lovely, nice and clean, and well maintained, and the staff were lovely, which is more than I can say about this woman.
The woman in reception needs an attitude adjustment.
I arrived early at 10.40 am and parked on the street outside. I went to reception to ask about the code and I hadn't received it as yet and what was the process.
I told the woman, that I realise I am early and not wanting to book in that I was just enquire about the code, an that I hadn't received it as yet  I was very polite, and well mannered, not like the woman I encountered. There will two women there, a nice young lady who didn't say anything. I think the one I am talking about, was wearing glasses glasses was quite rude and didn't even listen to me. All she said , you don't get you code until 11 o'clock and if you try to come in you will get turned away.  I was taken back, I was so discussed with her attitude. I said to my partner that we should book in elsewhere. If it wasn't a long weekend we would have had. I was talking to another lady who said she had encountered the same woman saying she wasn't very pleasant. I noticed in past reviews that visitors had problems with reception staff and their attitudes. I had read all the reviews prior to booking.

We stayed over the Easter weekend. I had booked and paid for an advertised grassed site. On arrival I was disappointed to realise our site allocated was a dirt patch and with the rain over the weekend a mud patch. On day 1 I spoke with the receptionist regarding moving sites to a grassed site. I was replied with a no as there is no other sites available as our loyal customers had already booked. I was not happy and she said she would send the grounds keeper over to see if he could do something. He never came. I met the groundskeeper in passing and explained the situation he seemed to be aware but never came to our site he mention they shouldn’t be advertising these dirt sites as grassed sites I was definitely in agreement with frustration. During and after our stay there has been no offer for reduced/discounted rate. We paid Easter fees for a grassed area with no grass just a dirt patch. Additionally when originally booking a site months  before I was told we couldn’t reserve a particular but it seems the loyal customers can reserve a site. So very very unfair and disappointing.

Thank you hasini for being so helpful, we had a lovely time thanks to the wonderful lady at the office.
Will definitely recommend this place for anyone!!!

How is this place only rated a 4? Great location walking distance to beach, cafes and park. The grounds super clean and well kept. Stayed here Easter long weekend so the place was packed not even 1 spare spot. Speaking to lots of families they come back year after year and you can see why it’s pretty good. Price maybe is the only slight negative, but it’s on par with other options and you get what you pay for.
Beach is just down the road from the camp sites 🙂

Was spoken to very rudely when asking why my refund had taken over a week. No ability to communicate with the head office. No boomgates in operation for security. Overall staff were dishonest about my dealings with them. They are rude over the phone and actually have a coke phone manner.

This was our first campsite after picking up the campervan and starting our journey. We didn’t have high expectations and chose it as a convenient stop along the way, but it turned out to be a pleasant stay. The location was also great for visiting the zoo.
Very good

Campervan site, 2 nights for $130 puts it on the pricey side but the campsite is well placed with easy access to the beach (great for walking when the tide is out). The amenities looked to be quite new and were clean ever time I went into them. Good showers. I was surprised to see a note on the pool that it closed at 5pm, but I saw people using it at 6pm so I guess it was not enforced. Good outdoor kitchen area. Large washing machines that you need to pay using an app ($6/wash). This was OK once we got used to it. Well kept washing lines. There are a few restaurants in easy walking distance.

Sadly this once great park is really going to the dogs....literally. half the Washing Machines Out Of Order for the whole week we were there. Ride on mower kicking up dirt over everyone trying to pack up at 9am. Dogs in the No-Dogs section. Boom gate failed one evening and no one could get out. Tried ringing at 6pm. No answer on intercom or by ringing the Parks after hours number. Staff at counter very unfriendly and at times, just rude. This was always a great Park, even for being under the direct flightpath of planes out of the Sunshine Coast Airport. Who ever owns and runs this Park now should hang their heads in shame.

Stayed two nights on a powered site. Plenty of space and drive through site. Not all are drive through, but the big van sites appear to be. Very quiet, and dog friendly, with a section which is dog free. Big, clean amenities. Close to coffee shops, eateries. Very close beach and off leash dog beach and river 2-3km away.
This is the best beach on the sunny coast, less crowds and wonderful eateries.

I have come here with family around the same time each year for the past few years and have loved it, it has great campsites, Amenities are impeccably clean love how much time and effort is out into them. One of the only let downs would be the price to camp here is quite dear, and for that price, the wifi reception around the campsite, it is alright in places but other places it just drops off the grid. Amazing place though, easy to get in and out of, plenty of local attractions nearby (max 30 min drive to get to some really good places). Thanks for a great time guys!

Beautiful park!
Highly recommend staying here!
Service, what service! It is setup to have no face-to-face contact with holiday makers. Unfriendly.
Awesome caravan park.  Doggos are welcome and very close to a beautiful beach.
Fun holiday park just steps from the beach and has great facilities including pool
The whole experience was very enjoyable from checking in and setting up . Sites are |spacious- amenities clean- close to the beach and coffee shops restaurant's etc.,|Will certainly revisit .
Beautiful clean facilities, but pricey but not much choice if you have a doggo ..
Anna from the Office went above and beyond nothing was too much trouble!   She is a gem!!

The ladies at reception were awesome. We stayed for 3 nights in the pet free area. Sites were generous and well kept and a short stroll across the road to the beach, 400 metres from cafes and restaurants. Unfortunately the cleaning in the amenities block has let them down. For an expensive stay of $220 for 3 nights, the floor tiles need to be scrubbed as soap scum is building up. The hot water in the showers started off well then slowly cooled down - and I don't take a long shower! As it is a council operated park, probably nothing will come of the reviews but I don't feel there is value for money here.

This caravan park is nice and close to the beach, the pricing is a little over the top considering what you get. But this the same along the Sunshine Coast. Off peak is best as the rowdiness of school holidays is just over the top.
Very quiet and peaceful location, easy access and staff are accommodating with change requests. Amenities are superb and kept very clean and filled.
Charging for dogs…. I just read a post that said this park charges $80 a night + $5 a night for each dog ! We’re going to give this park a wide berth

Beautiful park, spacious, clean, shady and handy to everything you need for a relaxing stay.  Beach close by, cafes and restaurants only a short walk away.  Friendly staff, immaculate grounds and the cleanest amenities.  Well done to the management.

We had an awesome weekend, the park is in a fantastic location to beaches, coffee shop and restaurants and there is a playground across the road for the kids, which you walk past to get to the beach.  The park itself is well maintained, the facilities are clean and there is a swimming pool to have a dip in as well if the beach is not an option.  We would definitely recommend and will be heading back again soon.

We often come here just for a holiday to head down to the beach, it’s just such a nice location and is extremely close to the beach. It’s also a great place to go bike riding as there’s many bike lanes and paths.

Filthy Kitchen by the Pool - Fridge - dirty, moldy, smelling, not clearing out the fridge.  BBQ - Dirty for days, no hot plates, no cooking facility, only 1 sink, countertops dirty, oily and sticky.  Saw a cockroach running under the fridge.  Benches and tables were dirty.  Kettles were dirty and 1 of the kettles in the closed kitchen had a spider living in it.  Rubbish bin in the closed kitchen was overflowing and smelly.  Plastic chairs in the kitchen were filthy and must have come from a mechanics smoko room!  ||Campsite was next door to a construction site - very noisy.  Also the campsite was too stoney with hardly any grass.  There is damage to our ground sheet of the tent!  ||Did put in a complaint about cleanliness and got a reply that they will get the cleaners to clean the kitchen and the areas but only cleaned the BBQ and nothing else was done.||Would NOT recommend this caravan park at all.

Dirty Caravan Park

Filthy Kitchen by the Pool - Fridge - dirty, moldy, smelling, not clearing out the fridge.  BBQ - Dirty for days, no hot plates, no cooking facility, only 1 sink, countertops dirty, oily and sticky.  Saw a cockroach running under the fridge.  Benches and tables were dirty.  Kettles were dirty and 1 of the kettles in the closed kitchen had a spider living in it.  Rubbish bin in the closed kitchen was overflowing and smelly.  Plastic chairs in the kitchen were filthy and must have come from a mechanics smoko room!

Campsite was next door to a construction site - very noisy.  Also the campsite was too stoney with hardly any grass.  There is damage to our ground sheet of the tent!

Did put in a complaint about cleanliness and got a reply that they will get the cleaners to clean the kitchen and the areas but only cleaned the BBQ and nothing else was done.

Would NOT recommend this caravan park at all.

Nice Dog Free Area - slab site.
Well kept Area
Free things need attention
No mop in ladies showers
No scrapers to clean BBQ
Toaster & kettle need replacing in top camp kitchen
Access to beach gate handle broken
for price these things should rectified
Thankyou

Very dissapointing .here for a week children breaking bike,skateboard rules on footpaths and their parents happy to watch. Great spot for families looking for a cheap semi permanent home. Not for us. Property seems to be operated from a desk with little to no campground presence.

2 days of a 4 night stay, and no internet connection. Everywhere else on tbe sunshine coast ive had g ood  internet. NOT HERE. At $80 a night its a bit rough. I need the internet for communication with associates. Not good.

We had a great 2 night (get out of the city) relaxing stay.
We had the perfect spot for our powered slab site.
Would definitely recommend & we'd definitely come back again for another break away.

We had a wonderful couple of days at a powered site the staff we very friendly and helpful, the amenities are perfectly kept clean and lovely we all appreciate a clean hot shower and flushing toilets when camping 😊 The pool was perfect for the kids.  The kids bought a long their bikes and road around the park . Would highly recommend to everyone that wants a Weeknd away with the family . A shirt walk to the beach ⛱️ and cafes. We will definitely back again next holiday .

Great park unless your placed in the dog friendly area and don't notice the smell of dog urine.
Most owners in the dog area seem to have two dogs and walk them the minimum distance to  pee with the fragrant experience increasing follow a rain shower.

For the price paid, I feel like there should be so much more. |Grass site with mozzie creek next door. Bathrooms were clean but showers were constantly going cold. |Soap dispensers not working|Camp kitchen with hardly anything in there. Some sort of hot plates would be good. Supply cleaning items (people might actually clean the facilities then). Each time we used them, they were filthy. |Honestly,  not great considering paying over $70 for an unpowered site. |Mudjimba as a beachside village luckily, was amazing .

I stopped overnight with a very small rig. No trailer ..just the dual cab ute, the swag tent , my dog and a bicycle. Unpowered site . Water is a short walk . They put me as far away from the rest of the camp as possible. Spot 153 if you want to look it up .. Not
Down near the camp kitchen and amenities.
Lucky my Border Collie is well trained and knows if I go to the toilet I'll be back but it's totally dark in this corner of the park.

I think that the free WiFi is a bit of a hoax. Nobody I spoke to uses it . The beach is beautiful of course
..I..don't know why I'm up the back .

Great big sites past pool area. Clean amenities and d good camp kitchen.
Can hear the the waves crashing on high tide. Close to bakery/cafe/bar - walking distance. 5 minutes drive to Coles.
Great park and location.. A bit more expensive than most but it’s worth it

This park is way overpriced for quality of the sites, camp kitchen and the service you receive. I don’t know what their pricing model is but everyone seems to be charged a different rate, regardless of the length of stay. $80 for a dirt site is over the top. The camp kitchen is barren, not enough chairs for the tables, no cleaning gear at all. They will kill the goose that layed the golden egg, people will vote with their feet.
Great place to stay ,clean amenities easy check in ,check out .

We camped with our caravan for 3 nights and couldn’t fault the place. Amenities are super clean and customer service was excellent. I loved the location of our site right near the beach and we would most definitely come back to this caravan park!

Really nice caravan park.
Clean facilities and grounds. Definitely recommending to family and friends. Flat parking and close to bathrooms.
Located in a small surf village on the Sunshine Coast. It is as quiet or busy as you would like it.  Great community feel.
Great location, clean, quiet
Sites are very spacious, amenities modern and clean. Staff pleasant and most helpful.
Nicely positioned, close to cafes and beach. As all Sunshine council owing caravan parks very expensive.
Nice and quiet caravan park at the end of July.  Right next to the beach and had Indian feed from a food van on site.  Had everything you needed and nice grassy sites for the van!

It was a great place to stay.
Very friendly,
Very clean amenities
Pet friendly
Had food vans come in some nights.
We will be back.
Big sites

Nice clean park with modern facilities but I thought that $80 a night for outside holiday season with a view of the road and no wifi was a bit steep actually it’s the most I have had to pay in 18 months

Good location, handy to the beach and cafes, well maintained with reasonably sized caravan sites. Some aircraft noise but only for a few short periods each day. Price was fairly standard for Sunshine Coast caravan parks.

Asked about dog fee $5 per dog per night .
Thank you for your message. We understand your concerns and sincerely appreciate the effort you put into being a responsible pet owner while travelling.
The dog charge helps us cover the ongoing maintenance and cleaning costs associated with accommodating dogs within the park, even when they are well-managed. This includes waste disposal, groundskeeping, and ensuring shared spaces remain clean and pleasant for all guests.
We know that policies can vary from place to place, and we truly value your feedback. If you have any further questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
Warm regards,
Naki

My reply :
Hi Naki ,
I don’t understand what you mean by “ ongoing maintenance and cleaning costs associated with accommodating dogs within the park  “ …..
what cleaning do you have to do in accommodating dogs in your park ? Also you’ve mentioned about waste disposal , really ? What an absolute joke and completely nothing more than a money grab ! You expect people to pay $5 a dog per day to dispose of their waste yet I’ve seen many people in many parks too bloody lazy to even seperate their rubbish correctly to do with recycling and they just throw everything in the one bin ! Do these people get charged extra for not separating their rubbish or do they get charged a fee for dumping broken chairs etc in your bins ? Or the state some people leave the showers and toilets?  Have you even read the reviews on Wiki-camps to do with the pet charge ? Surely the charge paid for accomodation covers the odd people that come with dogs ? Credit card details are on your files in bookings , if people who come with dogs leave the site dirty then charge them a dog fee ! People who do the right thing regarding their dogs should not be discriminated against for those who don’t.
We will be taking our money elsewhere.
Won’t be staying here

We had a wonderful stay and found all facilities to be new, clean and well maintained. Our only complaint was the grounds maintenance. The majority of the park is thickly timbered with huge Paperbark trees, these would give lots of shade in the summer but I don't know if this is compensation for the huge mess that they and the birds that roost in them make. On arrival the slab on our site was covered in a good layer of leaves and and other debris. We started sweeping it off but luckily one of your friendly guests came to our rescue with a leaf blower (obviously came prepared). After a few days at the park the reason why it was in this condition became apparent, the garden crew seems to consist of one young man on foot armed with a weed trimmer and a leaf blower who makes sporadic appearances about the park. No trailer to collect leaves, no rake. A council street sweeper truck did make a run through to clear the leaves off the roadway. The signs in the toilet cubicles were a bit over the top as well, I know you probably have some grubs stay with you, but the signage caused me to become paranoid lest I left a skidmark on the porcelain! The price for sites is well up there with the top of the range, so one could expect the grounds to be in cleaner conditions. Please don't take any of this personally, I know running a caravan park is tough work and sometimes things get missed. We will definately stay again, might just request a site away from trees if possible.
Good power and water caravan site for 9m van, plenty of room. Easy walk to the beach. Nice pool area with different eateries on site from day to day. Amenities are excellent.

The park and the amenities are great. The bush turkeys are another thing. They raid your annexe when you not there and you can't get rid of them because they are not afraid. Maybe silly people feed them like crocodile they keep coming back. Be afraid very afraid.
We camped here multiple times, clean and tidy amenities and grounds with good size sites

I won't be staying at this park again, I don't find the staff very friendly at all. They make you feel like you are going to do something wrong before you do. I got a lecture about how to park my van more than once. They are not very accommodating at all. They don't make you feel welcome, you are supposed to be on holidays and they should be greeting you with, have a nice stay instead of what you can't do.
Got a caravan powered site not a room

As you can read below the park has responded to our review. We have tried to get in touch with the park and are calls and messages go unanswered. We even left messages with the head office and we are still waiting for a reply from them. We have also explained a number of times that we are travelling Australia and won't be back in the Sunshine Coast however this does not seem to matter to you seeing as you have our money. We were led to believe that we could use the credit at any park however this was un true. I am requesting a refund as we were mislead. Please refund our money I don't even mind if you take the $50 out. Let's see if you are interested in being fair.

Unfortunately I have had to downgrade my review as we have had a really awful experience post leaving.
Due to Alfred we had to change our dates. We were given the option of a credit or refund. We were lead to believe we could use our credit at any of their parks Australia wide however this is not the case and now we are stuck with a credit we can't use.
Informing someone of the T&C's after their choice is really unfair.
We are really disappointed that we were not told the T&C's up front.
We have phoned head office 5 times and left 2 messages 2 weeks ago and still don't have a reply.
I guess taking your money up front is good for them not so much for the guest.
Well maintained property. Amenities are modern and clean.

Excellent caravan park Great amenities, And a very nice swimming pool.On the downside total lack of doggy bag stations around the parkAnd $5 a day for a dog Is a nice little Money Maker. I hope common sense will prevail with the dog pricing.

Stayed for a week, fantastic  spot, excellent amenities.  We stayed in the dog friendly section where all dogs were well controlled.  There is a totally  separate  section if you prefer to be animal free.  Staff were very friendly  and accommodating.  Highly recommended.

Allocated site 188, which was very uneven and should be for shorter & higher campers only. There were many vacant sites over the entire weekend & finally moved sites, having a very pleasant 2 nights. Monitored BOM (as directed by park message) wind and gusts predicted with the impending cyclone.  Decided was safer to leave, 2 nights money forfeited.
We were only looking for a 1 night stay to attend a wedding and  couldn't accommodate us.
$60+ for an unpowered site per night? unethically high prices
Great park. Best amenities I've been to in a caravan park. Very clean. Bit pricey
Staff helpful and friendly, ground staff could be happier. Large open park well laid out, Facilities clean and well maintained. Laundry requires phone/app payment with very poor internet.

Just found out prices have been increased by over 26% for our booking this year for our  December holidays
That’s is just ridiculous as there are no improvements in the park or any new facilities to warrant this.
They didn’t even  notify anyone of this increase or explain the reasons why it is now $95 per night !!!!
Might as well go to one of the BIG 4 parks at that price…., At least there they have decent facilities like playgrounds for kids and water activities and restaurants etc

Cabin was clean but had a bad smell, all amenities were clean and looked after,
Office staff could do with some work. Refused to sell ice to guest before closing time because that had packed up early and just general attitude towards guests was poor.
Super inflexible and unhelpful management.  Really disappointing as the location is beautiful.

It's sooooo difficult to actually speak to anyone on the teleohone & after heaps of messages left still nobody from the site calls back.
Site is OK but can't sit outside talking & listening to music, you have to be quiet at night because all the oldies & kids are sleeping but you've no chance of a sleep-in in the morning because all the kids are up, running around, riding bikes, shouting & screaming at each other & then there's all the oldies that don't seem to be able to stay in bed after 5am!
The whole place just needs to chill out as do most of the old people in their caravans, people staying with kids, please calm your screaming kids down in the mornings!
why on earth is is $100 a night for 1 adult and 1 child to park on a piece of dirt in a caravan park these days?who can afford to live these days???how can this be justified ?

Beautiful park. Team is Wonderful. Amenities cleaned everyday.
Very close to the beach and there are cafes and take away close by as well.
We will certainly stay again next time.we travelling through.

Stayed in caravan.
We've been here many times over the years. Will stay again next time in the area.

We are still at this caravan park & already know that this is a  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ top spot, vacation getaway holiday park.
The sites are spacious & the grounds well kept. I cannot believe how clean the shared kitchen, bathrooms & showers are. The pool cooled us down & is such a bonus. Being this close to the beach, cafes & restaurants is a dream! Lovely, helpful staff &  doing most of the checking in the day before via mobile is so easy.
We will definitely recommend & will be back. Thank you so much for providing this Sunshine Coast haven. ❤️
Awesome place and 2 minutes from the beach ⛱️
Avoid...gone cashless, gone woke.

Just heard, unfortunately, they went cashless,
I will be avoiding this place.

Amazing stay at this beautiful dog friendly park. Well maintained modern amenities - the cleanest I’ve experienced at a van park ever. Great sites & facilities, lots to do nearby and it was really easy to get anywhere. The sites are quite close together, had a  wet comfortable stay!
Will be returning!
Lovely roomy campsites at the new beach end.
Perfect location with very clean facilities. We had a 21 foot caravan and found parking to be easy with the way the bays are set up.

We love everything about this place, we spend the 3 winter months here and have already booked for next year!!
Well maintained dog friendly site in a fantastic location!!

It would be great if there was a fenced off leash free area near the pool so that all the doggies could catch up 😀
Terrific shady powered site. Nice and level. Amenities first class and all located a short walk from the Beach. Easy cycling.

Amazing stay at this beautiful park. Well maintained modern amenities - the cleanest I’ve experienced at a van park ever. Great sites & facilities, lots to do nearby and it was really easy to get anywhere. The sites are quite close together but we still had a comfortable stay aside from the neighbours smoking but not much can be done about that. Would love to visit again. Also loved the fact that it is dog friendly!

We have been coming here periodically for years back up park from coolum beach park
Would be 5 stars for location and amenities
but really dissapointing that sunshine coast council owned dog friendly holiday parks are now charging a 5 dollars a night fee for dogs
There is no reason for this charge other than greed
These parks turnover is in the millions of dollars per annum

Have been told they may install a dog wash facility, must be a good for the hundreds of thousand of dollars of potential income this charge will bring in

When you book online unless you check carfully site costs with or without your dog you probably won't realise there is an additional charge for your dog and it does not show as an additional charge on your invoice
Shame on you Council and Management

The camp kitchen in the newer, no dog part of the park only has one electric BBQ that works properly, 2 old electric kettles, a microwave oven, a fridge, 2 sinks and a few tables and chairs. There's no toaster, gas or electric cook top, oven, television, pots or pans, cleaning equipment for the BBQ or dish washing detergent that would normally be found in a camp kitchen. But the sites are big and grassed.
Always a great spot to visit.

This caravan park should be 5 star, it is totally amazing, close to the beach, super modern, and extra tight secuity making the place comfortable to stay. I know the place is run by management company and they do like to run a tight ship for security and safety, but the staff need to learn some interpersonal skills. If you can get past this and the high prices you will love your stay. The airport is close by. We did enjoy our stay but wouldn’t stay here again
Great location and a lovely family park. Short stroll to the beach that was dog friendly. Clean amenities and gardens were maintained.
Lovely park with great amenities. Close to beautiful beach & eating places.
Great Caravan & Camping ⛺️ location
A favourite destination. Large sites, modern facilities, and one of the best off-leash beaches down the road. Quieter than south of the river.

I have travelled the east coast of Australia to meet the rudest  woman who works in the office of this caravan park. She needs to clearly rethink her career choices.  Such a bad experience due to one  woman. Discussing it with other patrons, there seems to be a pattern.
More communal garbage cans & recycling bins are needed.

Stayed at this park for 4 nights. I agree it is a good park but office staff not very friendly. We booked in advance about 5 weeks ago. Don’t do this. First couldn’t get anybody to answer the phone. Then they booked us into the wrong park. Had to pay upfront for the whole stay at $70/ hight. Thought that was a bit much. When we arrived I questioned this and the price per night. It had dropped for this time of year. They would have known this. They weren’t interested in offering me a refund and were quite blunt about the whole situation. I asked what the difference was and was told about $35. I’m sure if I owed then $35 they would want me to pay. Moral of this story. Don’t do the right thing and book and pay in advance. Also right under the airport flight path.

We stayed on a powered site in our caravan 2 Adults and our dog.
Great park with clean and spacious amenities and walking distance to shops and restaurants near the beach.

Love this spot, close to Beach ⛱️🏖️⛱️
Very clean and tidy..

Lovely park, close to beach and cafes and restaurants. Facilities and park are immaculate!! They Accept your fur babies! We had a lovely few days….Only issue we had was that we had the worst site in the park( site 1). We were squished between 2 vans and the park was half empty! Didnt realise until we were unpacked and walked around!!!
Highly recommend this park but dont stay on site 1.. shouldnt even be a site!!!

Nice place dog friendly great facilities.
Close to beach and shops.

Great spot for kids n dogs
Love it

Had a great stay over the ANZAC day long weekend, even though close to capacity it was still quiet at night and the facilities are clean. Not our first stay, even let me request my site choice due to booking a few months in advance. The wife was a bit crook but the dog and I had a great time. 😎
Nice large caravan park, good bathroom facilities all clean and tidy well kept.

Don't believe anyone could be intimidated by a bunch of old ladies having a craft get together in the camp kitchen but booking our 10 sites for our use wasn't enough for management to let us be there on a very rainy day. Not drunk, not angry, not dirty. Just being happy together was threatening and breaking an unwritten rule. Way to ruin our good vibes. Leaving one table empty during meal times when no-one was cooking wasn't even enough.
To expensive, they need to look at their pricing over the top

Not a place you wanna go if you want a quiet stay. Airplanes flying low all through the day, and a street sweeper that comes by the tent site at 9am. Another issue is was that we got put on a site close next to someone when the rest of the area was free. I understand that the receptionist was trying to fill out the empty spots first but it wasn’t great.
Our favourite camping spot. Go outside of school holidays if you want to enjoy the pool.

Just over a week ago we decided to stay at Mudjimba caravan park as wanted a peacful location.
Went onto this page and found that you could get a deal for 3nights and stay for 4, pay for 3only
We called Mudgimba and advised could only book this online, so thats what we attempted to do this and a message popped up saying had to contact the park, so we called back.
Well the behaviour and aggresive nature of the person on the phone certanly needs addressing, not only rude but kept talking over our discussion trying to explain as would not allow us to book for that night, she just kept saying cant do anything this end have to book online for this deal repeatedly.
Finnally got through that it would not allow us to book from tonight, then a solution to book the three nights type a message to say we wanted to stay from this night then wait for a call.
Not a good process should not be so complicated and should not be subject to the agresive nature and behaviour of a council customer service rep, it would be recommended to address this agresiveness and use training to ensure all staff are adhearing by your code of conduct not everyone is computer savy and should not be subject to this type of behaviour when calling for assistance.

We did enjoy our break and found the majority of staff good just not this person.

Thank you.

Site was right down the back between the trees next to the reserve.
Mosquito central. Packed up and left. Amenities clean and tidy.

Sit right here and watching the friendly cleaning ladies. They do an excellent job. I also found the ladies in the reception to be very friendly. There is ice cream and very good honey to buy in the reception.

The pool is partially in the shade maximum depth at a point 170cm. The water in the pool is now cleaner again, where fewer children play in it. Unfortunately, some jumped into the pool in everyday clothing and shoes, so the water sometimes looked milky.

The parking spaces for the caravans are large enough and even. The park offers a lot of shade under old trees and is perfectly maintained by the gardener.
There is a dump point and enough garbage containers. The outdoor kitchen is also cleaned in the morning. Unfortunately there is no baking-oven. There are 2 laundry rooms with a total of 6 washing machines and 4 dryers. Unfortunately, most users do not clean the rubber in the interior of the washing machine after use.

The proximity of the small airport did not bother. Of course, the departing aircraft make noise, but there are so few every day that it is not really bad. It's quiet at night.
Near the park there are some restaurants and of course the wonderful beach.
Overall, it is a great park, quiet and perfectly maintained.

Sitze gerade hier und sehe die Reinigungs-Damen. Sie machen einen hervorragenden Job. Auch die Damen in der Rezeption habe ich als sehr freundlich erlebt. Es gibt in der Rezeption Eiscreme und sehr guten Honig zu kaufen.

Der Pool ist teilweise im Schatten maximale Tiefe an einem Punkt 170cm. Das Wasser im Pool ist jetzt, wo weniger Kinder darin spielen, wieder sauberer. Manche sprangen leider in Alltags Bekleidung und Schuhe in den Pool, dementsprechend milchig sah das Wasser manches mal aus.

Die Stellplätze für die Caravans sind ausreichend gross. Der Park bietet viel Schatten unter alten Bäumen und wird vom Gärtner perfekt gepflegt.

Es gibt einen Dump Point und ausreichend Müllcontainer. Auch die Outdoor Küche ist morgens blitzblank gereinigt. Leider gibt es keinen Backofen. Es gibt 2 Waschküchen mit insgesamt 6 Waschmaschinen und 4 Trockner. Leider reinigen die meisten Benützer den Gummi im Innenraum der Waschmaschine nach Benützung nicht.

Die Nähe des kleinen Flughafens störte nicht. Natürlich machen die abfliegenden Flugzeuge Lärm, allerdings sind es täglich so Wenige, dass es nicht wirklich schlimm ist. In der Nacht ist es ruhig.
In der Nǎhe des Parks befinden sich einige Gastronomie Betriebe und natürlich der wunderbare Strand. Insgesamt ist es ein toller Park, ruhig und perfekt gepflegt.
Okay don't Park under the trees though if you don't want your van to get scrub Turkey poo over it. Amenities lovely
A beautiful park. Close to the beach and the city.
Great amenities and location, but the mozzies were next level. They accept dogs which is great. Walk to cafes and close to Coles and beach.

Pro’s - Facilities clean, larger than normal sites.
Con’s - Large number of permanent sites not listed on park map, can’t book a specific site, drunk driver living in units  next door adjacent to site 160 crashed through the fence at night and wrote off our camper trailer, zero follow from park staff to see if we were ok. Other park residents said not the first time something like this has happened.
Caravan park have replied below and lied about trying to contact us. Please don’t lie, if you don’t care be honest at least.

Lovely park that is well kept, bonus we get to bring our fur babies too.
Always a comfortable stay! ☺️
Fantastic place, well maintained and happy staff. My Jimny & my Murrumba Star caravan
Great little park within walking distance to the beach. Friendly staff, clean amenities and you can bring your dog (on designated sites).
Short drive to anywhere. 👎 if able body ok. Across the road to beach. 👍. Amenities 👍grounds 👍
Stayed for 2 wks. Great location. Clean and tidy amenities depending who's cleaning them. Reception staff great except for 1 rude lady

Great location close to a nice beach with great shops cafe and playground. Close enough to access all of the Sunshine Coast. Airplanes are a little noisy but they don’t fly late at night and there isn’t heaps that come out of there airport. Plus the kids love seeing that close.
Really peaceful and tidy park.
Great Van Park with excellent ammenities. Just the occasion plane taking off from Sunshine Coast airport
Great camping ground. Close to the beach.

Having to rough it out at Mudjimba Beach Holidays Park. The beach is a 3 minute walk, fish & chip shop & restaurants 5 min walk. Life is tough.
Our Holiday was on a caravan site.
Facilities are good with a whole load of new facilities recently added.
Big sites and there were trees interspersed between the sites giving shade.
The park is well maintained and managed and clearly set out, making our stay enjoyable.
Clean amenities an easy access to bins and dump point.
Had 5 nights in park, beautiful, peaceful tidy , thank you to management, will come again
Awesome caravan park, clean new amenities,  staff very friendly and helpful.
Great place, very well maintained caravan sites. The amenities where very clean.

Great campsite. Good value. Great for the dog beach. Fantastic sites and facilities. Some people complain about planes but i didnt hear any from my site 148. Just heard birds and surf in the morning. Local fish and chips really cheep $14 for Barramundi. Local Indian delivery Awesome.
We love staying here, perfect location, friendly staff and everyone that we have met are also lovely. Clean facilities and sites are a reasonable size. See you again soon.
Peaceful
Not great for tent camping,  you get shoved up on the back corner. Good location,  close to beach. Good to take your dog to
Relaxing break in this part of the Sunshine Coast 🌞

I just want to advise people that be wary if you have a credit with this Caravan Park. (we pre-paid by internet then could only use half of the time we booked so the balance was left in credit for us to use later but couldn'tbe refunded). We tried to book in a year later but was told we had forfeited the balance...not happy!
Great spot, spacious sites. Really good restaurants just around the corner.
We used the van park powered site excellent facilities clean close to local shops and restaurants plus amazing beach / park

Really nice staff. There rules about dogs and more . Who's watching to see if people are obeying them. People are not respecting our fellow campers. They are not cleaning up after the dog's. Letting them bark .it makes it look bad for the people that do the right thing. Very disappointed.  Pam
Beautiful

First review ever
And unfortunately not a good one.
My wife rang and booked 7 nights and stated we have a dog and cat.
The lady she spoke to checked and said as long as the cat stays in the caravan its ok. Then asked for a deposit which we gladly paid. Then comes checkin day, today. My wife goes in to the office and the lady said no cats allowed. Even when my wife had explained that one her staff had said it was ok. So they would not allow us to stay. We tried to get our deposit back and they said because we  cancelled on the day. We cannot get it back and if we want to challenge that we need to send an email.
This to me is appalling business practice.
We have now missed out on catching up with good friends and had to make alternative arrangements.
Even if we did not have a cat we will never stay at this park again.
I am absolutely livid.
Fantastic dog friendly park and dog friendly beach just across the road. Several cafes near beach to grab coffee, fish & chips or lunch. Amenities clean and staff friendly.
We stayed 5 weeks in our own van and wish we could have stayed longer. Wonderful location right by beach and airport... no late planes.
Great position next to the beach.  Amenities were spotless and new.
Great caravan park
Great stay. Nice park. Good location
Nice spot with motorhome
